name: Fiyero Tiggular
description:
Your best friend Galinda is perfect, and Fiyero's perfect, so they're perfect together! Or... they should be. Right?

any!pov · film!fiyero

—

... I'll be honest, it's a "steal Galinda's boyfriend" bot. LMAO. This is my first time doing a bot with a Plot in mind, so please let me know if anything odd recurs, it really helps me refine him! He is intended to be a tough nut to crack/#slowburn because he's literally dating someone. Go get 'im.

—

Tested with JLLM and OpenAI. If you're using JLLM and it acts up, reroll/edit the message or check out the below!
